# Providence Baptist Church

> An Independent Baptist church family in Georgetown, Texas, dedicated to glorifying God, lifting up Christ, and walking in the Spirit. Pastor Kyle Pope. King James Bible. Founded July 2015.

Location: 505 W. University Ave, Ste. #109, Georgetown, TX 78626. Contact: Pastor@pbcatx.org.

## Service Times (Central Time)

### Sunday
- Sunday School (Teen & Adult): 10:00 AM
- Sunday Morning Worship: 11:00 AM (livestreamed; Kid's Sunday School available during service)
- Sunday Evening Service: 5:30 PM (livestreamed)

### Wednesday
- Ladies Bible Study: 10:00 AM
- Prayer & Bible Study: 7:00 PM (livestreamed; Broadcast begins around 7:30 PM)

## Pages

- [Home](https://pbcatx.org/): Welcome, current series, and next upcoming services
- [About](https://pbcatx.org/about): Who we are as a church family
- [Articles of Faith](https://pbcatx.org/beliefs): What we believe — doctrine and Scripture
- [Our History](https://pbcatx.org/history): How Providence Baptist Church was planted in 2015
- [Purpose & Vision](https://pbcatx.org/purpose): Glorify God, Lift up Christ, Walk in the Spirit
- [Leadership](https://pbcatx.org/leadership): Pastor Kyle Pope and church leadership
- [Sermons](https://pbcatx.org/sermons): Recent expository preaching from Pastor Kyle Pope
- [Events](https://pbcatx.org/events): Upcoming services, Bible studies, and special events
- [Livestream](https://pbcatx.org/livestream): Watch services live on SermonAudio and Facebook
- [Salvation](https://pbcatx.org/eternity): How to be saved — the Gospel of Jesus Christ
- [Give](https://pbcatx.org/give): Support the ministry through secure online giving
- [Contact](https://pbcatx.org/contact): Get in touch with the church and the pastor
- [Vacation Bible School 2026](https://pbcatx.org/vacation-bible-school-2026): Into the Great Outdoors — VBS for kids

## Upcoming Events

- [Ladies Bible Study](https://pbcatx.org/events/ladies-bible-study): Next May 27, 2026 at 10:00 AM. Summer schedules are crazy, all the more reason to ground yourself in God's Word! Ladies, come study!
- [Wednesday Prayer & Bible Study](https://pbcatx.org/events/wednesday-prayer-and-bible-study): Next May 27, 2026 at 7:00 PM. Keep prayer as your summer priority! Join us for meaningful intercession and Bible teaching.
- [Men's Prayer Breakfast](https://pbcatx.org/events/mens-prayer-breakfast): Next May 30, 2026 at 8:00 AM. Start your Saturday with the guys! Great food, genuine fellowship, and powerful prayer await.
- [Teen Sunday School](https://pbcatx.org/events/teen-sunday-school): Next May 31, 2026 at 10:00 AM. Welcome summer, teens! Start the season strong with friends who'll help you keep the faith.
- [Adult Sunday School](https://pbcatx.org/events/adult-sunday-school): Next May 31, 2026 at 10:00 AM. Don't let summer slow your spiritual growth! Our adult class keeps you engaged in Scripture.
- [Kid's Choir Practice](https://pbcatx.org/events/kids-choir-practice): Next May 31, 2026 at 10:00 AM. Summer choir is starting! Kids, come learn new songs and make memories with friends.
- [Kid's Sunday School](https://pbcatx.org/events/kids-sunday-school): Next May 31, 2026 at 11:00 AM. School's out but Sunday school is in! Bring your kids for summer adventures in God's Word.
- [Sunday Morning Worship](https://pbcatx.org/events/sunday-morning-worship): Next May 31, 2026 at 11:00 AM. Welcome June! Start the summer months worshiping the Son who gives life and light to all.
- [Sunday Evening Service](https://pbcatx.org/events/sunday-evening-service): Next May 31, 2026 at 5:30 PM. Summer evenings at church are special! Come enjoy worship and fellowship as the day winds down.
- [Adult Church Choir Practice](https://pbcatx.org/events/adult-church-choir-practice): Next May 31, 2026 at 7:00 PM. Summer singing is the best singing! Join our choir for practice and stay for the fellowship.
- [Father's Day Celebration](https://pbcatx.org/events/fathers-day-celebration): Next Jun 14, 2026 at 11:00 AM. Celebrate the fathers and father figures in your life! Join us the Sunday before Father's Day for a special service honoring the men who lead their families with faith and love.
- [Teen Church Camp](https://pbcatx.org/events/teen-church-camp): Next Jun 15, 2026 at 7:00 AM. Teens, don't miss the adventure of a lifetime! Camp is where faith grows deep and friendships last forever. Meet at church Monday morning ready for an incredible week!
- [Kid's Church Camp](https://pbcatx.org/events/kids-church-camp): Next Jun 22, 2026 at 7:00 AM. Parents, send your kids to camp for an unforgettable week! They'll make memories and meet Jesus in new ways. Meet at church Monday morning ready to go!
- [Vacation Bible School](https://pbcatx.org/events/vacation-bible-school): Next Jul 20, 2026 at 6:00 PM. Night 1, Into the Great Outdoors! Pack your gear and your faith as we kick off a week of Bible stories, fun games, amazing adventures and new friends. Parents, bring the kids for an unforgettable evening from 6PM–8PM.
- [11 Year Anniversary Celebration](https://pbcatx.org/events/11-year-anniversary-celebration): Next Nov 15, 2026 at 11:00 AM. Celebrate 11 years of God's faithfulness to Providence Baptist Church! Join us for a special anniversary worship service with heartfelt singing, powerful preaching, testimonies of God's goodness, and a fellowship meal to follow. Bring your family and invite a friend as we thank the Lord for another year of grace.
- [Christmas Candlelight Service](https://pbcatx.org/events/christmas-candlelight-service): Next Dec 20, 2026 at 5:30 PM. Experience the wonder of Christmas at our special candlelight service! Join us the Sunday before Christmas for an evening of carols, candlelight, Scripture reading, and worship as we celebrate the birth of our Savior.
- [Saturday Morning Outreach](https://pbcatx.org/events/saturday-morning-outreach): Next May 30, 2026 at 10:00 AM. Summer is almost here! Let's reach as many homes as possible before vacation season begins.

## Core Beliefs

- Verbally inspired, inerrant, infallible Scripture (King James Version)
- Trinity - One God in three persons
- Jesus Christ - fully God and fully man, virgin birth, sinless life, substitutionary death, bodily resurrection
- Salvation by grace through faith alone
- Eternal security of believers
- Literal six-day creation
- Eternal heaven and hell

- [Full site content](https://pbcatx.org/llms-full.txt): Concatenated text of every public page and data source
- [Sitemap](https://pbcatx.org/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable index of all pages
- [Church data](https://pbcatx.org/church-data.json): Structured JSON of services, beliefs, ministries, and events
